name: Corrie ten Boom
title: Holocaust Survivor & Evangelist
bio: Dutch Christian watchmaker who, along with her family, helped many Jews escape the Nazi Holocaust by hiding them in her home. She was eventually imprisoned in the Ravensbrück concentration camp, where her sister Betsie died.
faith: After surviving the concentration camp, ten Boom traveled the world as a speaker, sharing her message of forgiveness and God's love. Her autobiography 'The Hiding Place' tells the story of her family's courageous faith. She famously forgave a former Ravensbrück guard face-to-face.

tagline: Forgave her Nazi captors and taught the world about God's love
